languages.text: Следы генетора Фебруса, покинувшего свиту Вольного Торговца, затерялись в бесконечности миров Простора Коронус. Изредка всплывали слухи о похищенных людях и странных юродивых из плоти и железа, в ужасе лепетавших о безумце, за плечом которого виднелась сама смерть.

After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.
languages.original_text: Следы генетора Фебруса, покинувшего свиту Вольного Торговца, затерялись в бесконечности миров Простора Коронус. Изредка всплывали слухи о похищенных людях и странных юродивых из плоти и железа, в ужасе лепетавших о безумце, за плечом которого виднелась сама смерть.

traits.locale_text: After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

languages.text: ジェネーター・フェブルスの消息は、フットフォールの喧騒の中で途絶えた。彼を探しに派遣されたエージェントたちは空手袋で帰ってきた。そして、その結果、ローグ・トレーダーの失った仲間の行方を知るための無駄な試みは、やがて消えていった。エオグンは数年後に発見された。彼は、フットフォールの貧民街を這い回る、改造された狂人だった。彼は、自分の施しを募るためのサーボ・スカルにしか話しかけなかった。
languages.original_text: Genetor Februs's trail went cold in the endless bustle of Footfall. The agents sent to find him returned empty-handed, and ultimately the Rogue Trader's fruitless attempts to discover the fate of {mf|his|her} lost companion died away. Eogunn was not discovered until years later — a crippled, augmented madman crawling through the slums of Footfall, speaking to none but the broken servo-skull that he used as his alms bowl.

traits.locale_text: ジェネーター・フェブルスの消息は、フットフォールの喧騒の中で途絶えた。彼を探しに派遣されたエージェントたちは空手袋で帰ってきた。そして、その結果、ローグ・トレーダーの失った仲間の行方を知るための無駄な試みは、やがて消えていった。エオグンは数年後に発見された。彼は、フットフォールの貧民街を這い回る、改造された狂人だった。彼は、自分の施しを募るためのサーボ・スカルにしか話しかけなかった。

languages.text: 基因士费布鲁斯离开行商浪人的随行队伍后，其行踪便消散在科罗努斯扩区的万千星辰间。偶尔会有关于绑架案的流言四起，还伴随着关于机肉缝合的怪异疯子的传说——那疯子在恐惧中嘶吼呓语，提及一个与死亡相伴的狂徒。
languages.original_text: After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费布鲁斯离开行商浪人的随行队伍后，其行踪便消散在科罗努斯扩区的万千星辰间。偶尔会有关于绑架案的流言四起，还伴随着关于机肉缝合的怪异疯子的传说——那疯子在恐惧中嘶吼呓语，提及一个与死亡相伴的狂徒。

languages.text: Après le départ du genetor Februs, sa piste se perd parmi les mondes innombrables des Étendues de Koronus. En de rares occasions, des rumeurs surgirent et firent état de personnes enlevées et d'étranges hommes de chair et de fer, déblatérant des propos incohérents à propos d'un dément portant la mort elle-même sur son épaule.
languages.original_text: After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

traits.locale_text: Après le départ du genetor Februs, sa piste se perd parmi les mondes innombrables des Étendues de Koronus. En de rares occasions, des rumeurs surgirent et firent état de personnes enlevées et d'étranges hommes de chair et de fer, déblatérant des propos incohérents à propos d'un dément portant la mort elle-même sur son épaule.

languages.text: Después de abandonar el séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, el rastro del genetor Februs se perdió en los infinitos mundos de la Extensión de Koronus. Rara vez surgían rumores sobre gente secuestrada y locos de hierro y carne que balbuceaban aterrados sobre un maníaco que llevaba a la misma muerte al hombro.
languages.original_text: After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

traits.locale_text: Después de abandonar el séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, el rastro del genetor Februs se perdió en los infinitos mundos de la Extensión de Koronus. Rara vez surgían rumores sobre gente secuestrada y locos de hierro y carne que balbuceaban aterrados sobre un maníaco que llevaba a la misma muerte al hombro.

languages.text: Genetör Februs, Hür Tacir'in maiyetinden ayrıldıktan sonra Koronus Enginliği'nin sonsuz dünyaları arasında izini kaybettirdi. Kaçırılan insanlara ve et ile demirden oluşan, omzunda ölümün ta kendisini gezdiren bir deli hakkında dehşet içinde sayıklayan tuhaf delilere dair söylentiler nadiren su yüzüne çıkar oldu.
languages.original_text: After Genetor Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue, his trail went cold among the endless worlds of the Koronus Expanse. On rare occasions, rumours would surface of kidnapped people and strange madmen of flesh and iron, who raved in terror about a maniac who trailed death itself at his shoulder.

traits.locale_text: Genetör Februs, Hür Tacir'in maiyetinden ayrıldıktan sonra Koronus Enginliği'nin sonsuz dünyaları arasında izini kaybettirdi. Kaçırılan insanlara ve et ile demirden oluşan, omzunda ölümün ta kendisini gezdiren bir deli hakkında dehşet içinde sayıklayan tuhaf delilere dair söylentiler nadiren su yüzüne çıkar oldu.

languages.text: Nachdem Genetor Februs das Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} verlassen hatte, verlor sich seine Spur in den endlosen Welten der Koronus-Ausdehnung. Ab und an machten Gerüchte von entführten Menschen und seltsamen Verrückten aus Fleisch und Eisen die Runde, die entsetzt von einem Wahnsinnigen erzählten, auf dessen Schulter der Tod selbst saß.

Ab und an machten Gerüchte von entführten Menschen und seltsamen Verrückten aus Fleisch und Eisen die Runde, die entsetzt von einem Wahnsinnigen erzählten, auf dessen Schulter der Tod selbst saß.
